tasks.label: Build Specific Project
args: $projects = Get-ChildItem -Path '${workspaceFolder}/projects' -Directory | Sort-Object Name; Write-Host '🔨 Available projects to build:' -ForegroundColor Green; for ($i = 0; $i -lt $projects.Count; $i++) { Write-Host "  [$($i+1)] $($projects[$i].Name)" -ForegroundColor Yellow }; $selection = Read-Host 'Enter project number or name'; if ($selection -match '^\d+$' -and [int]$selection -le $projects.Count -and [int]$selection -gt 0) { $projectName = $projects[[int]$selection - 1].Name } else { $projectName = $selection }; $projectPath = '${workspaceFolder}/projects/' + $projectName; if (Test-Path $projectPath) { Write-Host "🔨 Building: $projectName" -ForegroundColor Cyan; Set-Location $projectPath; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Atmel\Studio\7.0\toolchain\avr8\avr8-gnu-toolchain\bin\avr-gcc.exe' -mmcu=atmega128 -DF_CPU=7372800UL -Os -Wall -Wextra -I. -I../../shared_libs Main.c ../../shared_libs/_port.c ../../shared_libs/_init.c -o Main.elf } else { Write-Host "❌ Project not found: $projectName" -ForegroundColor Red }

tasks.label: Build All Projects
args: $projects = Get-ChildItem -Path '${workspaceFolder}/projects' -Directory | Where-Object { Test-Path "$($_.FullName)/Main.c" }; $total = $projects.Count; $current = 0; $success = 0; $failed = 0; Write-Host "Found $total projects to build`n" -ForegroundColor Green; foreach ($project in $projects) { $current++; Write-Host "[$current/$total] Building $($project.Name)..." -ForegroundColor Yellow; Set-Location $project.FullName; $result = & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Atmel\Studio\7.0\toolchain\avr8\avr8-gnu-toolchain\bin\avr-gcc.exe' -mmcu=atmega128 -DF_CPU=7372800UL -Os -Wall -I. -I../../shared_libs Main.c ../../shared_libs/_port.c ../../shared_libs/_init.c -o "$($project.Name).elf" 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $success++; Write-Host "  ✓ Success" -ForegroundColor Green } else { $failed++; Write-Host "  ✗ Failed" -ForegroundColor Red; Write-Host $result -ForegroundColor Red } }; Write-Host "`nBuild Summary:" -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host "  Success: $success" -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host "  Failed: $failed" -ForegroundColor Red; Write-Host "  Total: $total" -ForegroundColor White

tasks.label: Open Serial Monitor
args: Write-Host 'Available COM ports:' -ForegroundColor Green; [System.IO.Ports.SerialPort]::getportnames() | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $_" -ForegroundColor Yellow }; Write-Host 'Enter COM port (e.g., COM3):' -ForegroundColor Green; $port = Read-Host; Write-Host "Starting serial monitor on $port at 9600 baud..." -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host 'Press Ctrl+C to exit' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $serialPort = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort($port, 9600); try { $serialPort.Open(); Write-Host "Connected to $port" -ForegroundColor Green; while($true) { if($serialPort.BytesToRead -gt 0) { Write-Host $serialPort.ReadExisting() -NoNewline } Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 10 } } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" -ForegroundColor Red } finally { if($serialPort.IsOpen) { $serialPort.Close() } }

tasks.label: Program with Custom Programmer
args: Write-Host 'Available programmers:' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host '  arduino    - Arduino as ISP' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '  usbasp     - USBasp programmer' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '  avrisp     - AVRISP mkII' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '  stk500v2   - STK500 v2' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '  dragon_isp - AVR Dragon' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $prog = Read-Host 'Enter programmer type'; & '${workspaceFolder}/program.ps1' -Programmer $prog
